stemHtml: Shortly before landing, the co-pilot reports feeling unwell and becomes incapacitated. The aircraft lands safely. Per Regulation (EU) No. 996/2010, how and when should this be reported?

options.a: As a serious incident, to the national Safety Investigation Authority, without delay.
options.b: As an accident, to the national Safety Investigation Authority, without delay.
options.c: As a mandatory occurrence report, to the national Civil Aviation Authority, within 72 hours.
options.d: As a voluntary occurrence report, to the national Civil Aviation Authority, within 72 hours.
